<!--
Thanks for contributing to RepoFabric. Keep the summary short and the checklist
honest. CI runs the Pester and Node tests on every PR and must be green before
merge.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why. One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or internal change
- [ ] Security fix

## How it was tested

<!-- Commands run, manual steps, or the CI jobs that cover it. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`docker compose ... Invoke-Pester` and `node --test`), or CI is green.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or configuration changed.
- [ ] No secrets, internal hostnames, or private URLs added.
- [ ] Prose uses commas and full stops, no em dashes.

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
